_README: PLACEHOLDER — not a real query. To use: copy this file to scripts/feedme-daily-sales.query.json (gitignored) and replace its entire contents with the REAL request body you captured from the FeedMe `postgres-query` request (Chrome DevTools -> Network -> postgres-query -> Payload -> copy the JSON body). Keep ids OUT of the file by using the ${FEEDME_BUSINESS_ID} / ${FEEDME_RESTAURANT_ID} placeholders below — the script substitutes them from .env.local at runtime. The <<PASTE...>> marker must be gone or the script refuses to run.
query: <<PASTE THE CAPTURED DAILY SALES postgres-query BODY HERE>>
